summary: Phase 2 frontend testing of Happy Kidz preschool website. All 8 pages load correctly. Wave dividers, cartoon-card styles, polka-dot backgrounds, forms with validation/success messages all working as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 pages verified: /, /about, /programs, /admissions, /team, /testimonials, /blog, /contact. Wave dividers on Admissions(3), Team(3), Testimonials(3), Contact(2). Cartoon cards on Admissions(4). Polka-dot background on Team leadership section. Fee table has 6 rows (header+5 data). Admissions form validation shows errors on empty submit, success message with data-testid='admission-success' works. Contact form shows success with data-testid='contact-success'. Mobile hamburger menu works (class='lg:hidden p-2 rounded-xl...'). Footer has correct phone (+91 82491 56053) and email. WhatsApp floating button present on all pages. Stats on Testimonials: 500+ families, 4.9 rating, 10+ years, 98% recommend. Carousel prev/next buttons found.
mocked_apis: Form submissions (admissions + contact) are MOCKED - show UI success message only, no backend API calls
